name: Multi-Product Bundle - Retail Stores
userQuery: I have 3 retail stores that need connectivity, security cameras, and protection from attacks
reasoning: Context: Multi-branch retail business → needs integrated solution
Requirements breakdown: (1) 3 stores = Multi-site = SD-WAN, (2) security cameras = Managed Surveillance, (3) protection = Security Anti-DDoS
Solution strategy: Bundle 3 solutions working together - SD-WAN connects branches, Security protects all locations, Surveillance manages cameras centrally
Scale: Small Branches (3 locations) → Basic/entry-level packages

recommendedItems.name: SD-WAN Basic
recommendedItems.reason: Connects your 3 retail stores with centralized management. Optimizes bandwidth across locations and provides secure connectivity between sites. Perfect for 3-branch retail operations.

recommendedItems.name: Smart Cameras
recommendedItems.reason: Managed surveillance solution that works seamlessly with SD-WAN. Monitor all 3 stores from one dashboard. Includes AI-powered analytics for theft prevention and customer insights.

recommendedItems.name: On-Premise Defense
recommendedItems.reason: Protects all 3 locations from DDoS attacks and cyber threats. Fast local mitigation ensures your POS systems and inventory management stay online during attacks.

output.reply:
For your 3 retail stores, I recommend an integrated solution:

**SD-WAN Basic**: Connects all 3 locations with centralized management and secure inter-store connectivity
**Smart Cameras**: Centralized surveillance across all stores with AI analytics
**On-Premise Defense**: DDoS protection keeping your POS and inventory systems safe

These three work together to create a unified, secure network for your retail business. Would you like pricing details or information about installation timelines?

metadata.notes: Demonstrates multi-product bundling for complex requirements
